# The Byron Doula

> Nathalie Solis Pérez is a certified birth doula and parent coach with 13 years of experience supporting families in Byron Bay, Australia, and worldwide. She offers personalised birth preparation sessions and 1:1 parent coaching grounded in evidence-based care and the Aware Parenting approach. 46+ five-star reviews.

## Full content

https://thebyrondoula.com/llms-full.txt

## Sitemap

https://thebyrondoula.com/sitemap.xml

## Pages

- [Home](https://thebyrondoula.com/): Overview of services, credentials, and client reviews. Holistic support for pregnancy, birth, and early parenting.
- [About](https://thebyrondoula.com/about.html): Nathalie's background, story, full qualifications, training credentials, and selected media interviews.
- [Birth Preparation](https://thebyrondoula.com/birth-preparation.html): Personalised 2.5-hour birth preparation session. Virtual ($295 AUD) or in-person Byron Bay ($495 AUD).
- [Parent Coaching](https://thebyrondoula.com/parent-coaching.html): 60-minute 1:1 Aware Parenting coaching session with follow-up support. Virtual worldwide ($275 AUD).
- [Contact](https://thebyrondoula.com/#contact): Enquiries for birth preparation, parent coaching, doula mentoring, or general support.

## Services

### Birth Preparation
A personalised 2.5-hour session covering your birth plan, labour comfort and breathing techniques, medical and non-medical pain relief options, partner preparation, optimising birth outcomes, and a postpartum plan. Available in-home in Byron Bay or virtually worldwide.
- Virtual: $295 AUD
- In-Person (Byron Bay): $495 AUD

### Parent Coaching
A 60-minute Zoom session grounded in the Aware Parenting approach. For parents navigating tantrums, sleep struggles, power struggles, and behaviour challenges. Includes a personalised action plan, practical strategies, and 1 week of follow-up support via email, text, or voice note.
- Virtual: $275 AUD

## Credentials

- Cultural Anthropologist (M.A.)
- Certified Birth Doula CBI (Childbirth International)
- Certified Doula (Dr. Michel Odent)
- Certified End Of Life / Death Doula (Thoughtful Transitions)
- Trained in the Spinning Babies approach to childbirth
- Certified Aware Parenting Coach
- Trained in the Possums & Co evidence-based approach to sleep, breastfeeding, and unsettled babies
- Certified Yoga Teacher (BYV)
- Pregnancy & Birth Specialist / Parent Coach at Cleo

- "Mothering The Mother" — Mumma Milla · M. Magazine
- "The Confidence That Comes After 40" — The Rara Files
- "Perinatal Support for Mothers" — PBB Media Podcast
